programme.title: Mad Fate
programme.desc: A Master fortune teller predicts that Tung, a born psychopath, will be imprisoned for murder and tries to change his fate. A veteran detective believes Tung is a psychopathic serial killer after witnessing him kill a cat, and pursues him relentlessly. Can the Master change Tung’s mad fate?

programme.title: Executioners From Shaolin
programme.desc: The White-Browed Priest supports the brutal Qing government, burning down Shaolin Temple and hunting its disciples. Shaolin’s Hung falls in love with Fang while escaping the hunt and the couple have a son before Hung is killed by the Priest. To avenge his father, Hung’s son creates a new form of martial art combining his parents’ kung fu styles.

programme.title: Detective Dee and Nine-storey Demon Building
programme.desc: A series of strange incidents happen at the Tang’s demon building but Detective Dee finds no clue. Dee finds the master of the family suspicious when he speaks with him, and when the eldest daughter Miss Tang secretly informs Dee about Mr Tang’s strange behavior and the fact that she is kept under surveillance, Dee vows to unveil the truth.

programme.title: My First of May
programme.desc: Former squash champion Teng and his wife face devastating trials when their daughter is diagnosed with muscular dystrophy and his mother with cancer. Years later, as the family struggles between holding on and letting go, they find a new connection through a small but powerful sign of hope: the faint movement of their daughter’s pinky finger.

programme.title: Rivals of Kung Fu
programme.desc: As Shen and Wong Fei Hung’s relationship turns sour, Shen frames Wong and his disciple for murder. They are saved by a businessman Zhou, but Wong must win the Lion Dance Trophy to return Zhou’s favour. Can Wong Fei Hung defeat all skilled martial artists and complete his mission?

programme.title: Lion VS Lion
programme.desc: The traditional lion dance has never looked so good as in Lion VS Lion which captures the most impressive sequences of lion dancing on film. Besides being loaded with enjoyable martial arts chicanery, film historians can revel because it's also the first film that clearly demonstrates the intricacies and differences between the traditional Northern and Southern lion dancing techniques. The Five Venom alumnus and Chang Cheh discovery, Lo Meng, teams up with Liu Chia-liang protege Wang Yu, as they inadvertently turn from vagabond kung-fu school operators into anti-Ching, patriotic fighters.

programme.title: Intimate Confessions of a Chinese Courtesan
programme.desc: Young Ai Nu is abducted and sold to the popular Four Seasons brothel run by the powerful and ruthless Madam Chun Yi. Ai Nu gets locked up in a dungeon due to her fiery attitude. Soon, a murder occurs within the brothel and a policeman must race against time to prevent a vicious revenge plot from reaching its blood-spattered conclusion.

programme.title: My Blue Summer
programme.desc: Zhi has been secretly in love with Nan since she met him once as a child. After graduating high school, Zhi realizes that she and Nan are in the same university, where they get to know each other by chance and become close friends. However, Zhi is still too shy to express her love for Nan. Will this long-term crush finally turn into true love?

programme.title: Lifeline
programme.desc: A heroic tale about Hong Kong's brave firefighters. These courageous men can march into disastrous firegrounds and risk their lives to save others. However, do they have the same courage to confront their personal issues?

programme.title: Young Heroes of Chaotic Times
programme.desc: This story is set in Shanghai in the late Qing Dynasty, and talks about a young man, Chen Zhen, who rises to become a national hero after enduring hardships and overcoming challenges in life.

programme.title: Brave Archer And His Mate
programme.desc: Guo Jing and Huang Rong raise the son of his sworn brother Yang Kang and named him Yang Guo. To prevent Yang Guo from taking revenge for his father’s death, Huang Rong bans him from learning martial arts. Yang Guo runs away from home in anger and encounters Ouyang Feng, who teaches him the “Toad Stance” and accidentally unveils his true identity…

programme.title: The Dragon Missile
programme.desc: Sima works for a corrupt lord Qin who is suffering from a deadly disease that only a special herb can cure. Qin sends him on an urgent mission to retrieve it, but the task is made more difficult when Sima has to fight off other martial artists who want to steal the cure away from him. He has to fight with his ultimate weapon, the Dragon Missile!

programme.title: Love in a Fallen City
programme.desc: Based on a novel of the same name by the famous novelist Eileen Chang and directed by the equally acclaimed director Ann Hui, this romance story depicts the challenging relationship between an introverted Shanghai divorcee and a cynical Malaysian playboy during the Japanese invasion of Hong Kong in the 1940s. Will the lovers be together in the end?

programme.title: Iron Kung Fu Fist
programme.desc: Liang Kun is a skilled martial arts master who left the martial arts world to protect his lover. However, his disappearance leads to her tragic death and as Liang Kun finds a way to survive in the martial arts world, he fights back to avenge his lover’s death with the help of a beggar gang leader.

programme.title: A Taste Of Cold Steel
programme.desc: Gan Dai Xiong is killed by Prince Wu, who seeks to seize his Purple Sword. Prince Wu’s son join forces with an evil gang to steal the Purple Sword from Gan Dai Xiong’s three daughters. Eventually, Gan’s daughters team up with their cousin Xu to avenge their father’s death.

programme.title: Kumukulong Dugo
programme.desc: Kumukulong Dugo

programme.title: A E I O U
programme.desc: Five misbegotten but witty kids survived this cold-hearted community.They found their hero in the person of Captain Juan,a funny but dedicated cop.

programme.title: Kuwatog
programme.desc: Child sensation Niño Muhlach plays the lovable dwarf "Kuwatog." As punishment for his many pranks, he is transformed into a human child, here to remain until he does a deed that will benefit mankind.

programme.title: Paano Ba Ang Mangarap? (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: Lisa (Vilma Santos) and Benny (Jay Ilagan) have found their match in each other. Unfortunately, Benny dies before they get married.

programme.title: Grease Gun Brothers
programme.desc: Better known as the Grease Gun Brothers. Ramon (Dante Varona) and his brothers Rodrigo (Rey Malonzo), Romeo (Bembol Roco) and Renato (Roy Flores) play modern-day Robin Hoods to their urban poor community.

programme.title: Petrang Kabayo 2
programme.desc: Petra transforms himself into Peter ,a businessman with many holdings. But Peter's change in status also changes his personality.

programme.title: Kaliwa't Kanan, Sakit Ng Katawan
programme.desc: Ruben and Lorena are still on their honeymoon stage, but she has already decided to take on family planning the natural way. Disappointed and desperate, he gets into an illicit relationship.

programme.title: Jessica Alfaro Story
programme.desc: One more look at the shocking Vizconde rape and murder case. This time, from the point of view of self-confessed star witness to the crime, the controversial Jessica Alfaro.

programme.title: Working Girls (Digitaly Enhanced)
programme.desc: A humorous, but truly insightful look into the lives of women trying to make a living in the big city and coping with all the prejudice life bestowed on them because of their sex. This is also about their loves, their dreams, their weaknesses.

programme.title: Dobol Trobol
programme.desc: Nino and Hero were dutiful, loyal cops. They were also inept and were the main headaches of the police force of Baguio City. It was the luck of these bumblers, though, to stumble on a major case which had its origins in China.

programme.title: Hindi Pa Tapos Ang Laban (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: In a world where the most corrupt are the most powerful, is there a room a good man’s quest for justice to succeed? The undisputed King of Action takes on the role of a modern day crusader in this exciting, action packed movie that pits the powers of goodness against the forces of evil.

programme.title: Ang Titser Kong Pogi
programme.desc: Joey Perez (Bong Revilla, Jr), a policeman goes to Subic as a Kindergarten teacher to secretly investigate the case where he was framed up. He becomes attached to Cynthia, a co-teacher and Jimbo.

programme.title: Gabi Na Kumander (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: Gabi Na Kumander is the story of two brothers with opposite beliefs who suddenly find themselves in a fight for what each one believes is right.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets: Europe
programme.desc: Anchored by Anna Edwards and Mark Cudmore, a fast-paced show of news and analysis, building towards the drama and excitement of the start of trading across the Continent.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Science View
programme.desc: This episode looks at the "point clouds" for 3D data visuals used in architecture, archaeology, and autonomous driving. Plus, robots learn new moves.

programme.title: NHK News 7
programme.desc: NEWS 7 is NHK's flagship domestic evening news program, bringing you the latest from our Tokyo studio. It's presented with English audio on NHK World for our international viewers.

programme.title: Bosai
programme.desc: Phase Free is a disaster preparedness concept that does not distinguish between everyday life and emergency situations. We'll see how everyday items can be used in times of disaster as well.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: Episode 2 of this series on COP30 in Brazil focuses on "Amazon dieback." Deforestation has reached 17%, and scientists warn that exceeding a figure of 20% could disrupt the water cycle.

programme.title: Time-Lapse Japan
programme.desc: Matsue is known as the "city of water." It is home to Lake Shinji, which is famous for its shijimi clams. Through beautiful time-lapse footage, we see the lake's changing colors and expressions.

programme.title: Newsroom Tokyo
programme.desc: NEWSROOM TOKYO dives deeper into the day's news with insight and analysis, from the perspective of Japan and the rest of Asia. We put a spotlight on what you need to know to understand the issues.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Kurosaki Yu is a blacksmith specializing in Echizen cutlery, a 700-year-old Japanese craft. His knives are sought after by chefs in Japan and overseas. He talks about achieving ultimate sharpness.

programme.title: Herbal Symphony #1 Spring
programme.desc: In Uda, discover Japan's oldest private medicinal herb garden, where the natural landscape from 300 years ago is preserved in a botanical time capsule, a sanctuary of the local culture and history.

programme.title: Ukiyoe Edo-Life: Good Or Evil Soul
programme.desc: We visit the Yoshiwara district, Edo's most prominent pleasure quarters. Among the lavish spenders, courtesans and apprentices, small humanoid creatures scurry about - what could they be up to?

programme.title: Storage Hunters S5 8
programme.desc: Jesse and Papa Bear team up to go after a barbed-wire-protected safe. It's a big day for Brandon and Lori - they score an awesome sand rail, and a vintage surfboard which turns out to be highly collectible.

programme.title: Dirty Money S1 7
programme.desc: The Direstas meet a shrewd businessman who owns an aeronautic graveyard. Has John met his haggling equal? Can Jimmy create some unique aviation art?

programme.title: Dirty Money S1 8
programme.desc: In addition to restoring an old dartboard, a rusty neon bar sign forces the guys to head to a buddy's shop to help bring it back to life.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 13
programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke are having dinner in a hot tub… yup, it's exactly what you think. And it's a blast from the past as Kevin re-hacks a self-tanner. Plus, in the new Saved by the Hacks, our teens have let the hacks take over.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S3 6
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown. the guys share shameful secrets in the park, don headsets at a fast food drive-through, and try to convince unsuspecting strangers to dance with them.

programme.title: The West Wing S1 8
programme.desc: The President embarrasses Hoynes during a cabinet meeting.

programme.title: Smallville S2 22
programme.desc: When a famed linguist who was injured while studying the caves awakens from a coma, he possesses fantastic powers and goes on a dangerous mission.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 16
programme.desc: Leonard's purchase of a dining room table for the apartment nearly causes Sheldon to break up with Amy, while Howard is offered a chance to return to space again.

programme.title: Friends S8 16
programme.desc: Guilt-ridden Joey finally confesses his love for Rachel to the flabbergasted Ross.

programme.title: ER S1 24
programme.desc: Lewis delivers her sister's baby. Ross jeopardizes his relationship with Diane. Carter doesn't accept a position in the ER, as he believes he will be offered a surgical position.

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (Season 6)
programme.desc: When Hicks insists SWAT participate in Patrol Day in an effort to engage more meaningfully with the community, Hondo and Deacon have their hands full mentoring the newest members of the team.

programme.title: The Rookie (Season 8)
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: The Rookie (Season 6)
programme.desc: When two teenagers go missing, it is up to the entire team to find the girls and uncover the truth about their disappearance. Meanwhile, Lopez and Harper are on a different kind of investigation – the search for the perfect nanny.

programme.desc: As Maggie and the team search for New York’s latest serial killer, the copycat method used by the murderer forces Maggie to seek help from Ray Distefano, the serial slasher she put behind bars.

programme.title: Grand Designs Transformations - Belmont and Oatlands
programme.desc: In Geelong Victoria, Luke and Bree restore a Victorian cottage and add on a massive contemporary extension, while in the historic Tasmanian village of Oatlands, Karen and Stu restore a sandstone Georgian cottage.

programme.title: The World - Episode 59
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: Four Corners - Episode 9
programme.desc: The multi-award winning Four Corners returns for another year of powerhouse investigative journalism - fearless and forensic, exposing scandals, triggering inquiries, leading debate and holding power to account for 65 years.

programme.title: Media Watch - Episode 10
programme.desc: Australia's leading forum for media analysis and comment. Host Linton Besser, a four-time Walkley award-winning investigative reporter and former foreign correspondent, brings you a fearless critique of the week's journalism.

programme.title: Australia: An Unofficial History - Between Hope and Reality
programme.desc: Amid a period of significant political and social change Australian filmmakers uncover a stark contrast between the nation's progressive aspirations and the real lives of its people.

programme.title: ABC Late News - Episode 75
programme.desc: End your day with the latest on the day's top stories. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe to uncover what's happening and why it matters. Presented by Michael Tetlow in Perth.

programme.title: The Business - Episode 43
programme.desc: Australia's leading daily business and finance show, bringing you up to date on market moves, economic trends and the forces affecting consumers, employees and business owners big and small. Presented by Kirsten Aiken.

programme.title: 7.30 - Episode 59
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: The World - Episode 59
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: Grand Designs Transformations - Belmont and Oatlands
programme.desc: In Geelong Victoria, Luke and Bree restore a Victorian cottage and add on a massive contemporary extension, while in the historic Tasmanian village of Oatlands, Karen and Stu restore a sandstone Georgian cottage.

programme.title: Dream Gardens - Strath Creek, VIC

programme.desc: The multi-award winning Four Corners returns for another year of powerhouse investigative journalism - fearless and forensic, exposing scandals, triggering inquiries, leading debate and holding power to account for 65 years.

programme.title: Play On - Episode 2
programme.desc: Paul Kennedy meets the Qasimi family, who are Hazaras who escaped a suicide bombing in Pakistan before finding refuge in Australia - and football. Plus the Puoch family, a Sudanese family who live and breathe basketball.

programme.title: The World - Episode 59

programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings - Episode 76
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon - Episode 76
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: The Matchmakers - Episode 2
programme.desc: As the matchmakers send out their singles on first dates, we learn more about the matchmaker's own matches and what they think is the measure of a successful marriage.

programme.title: Ambulance Australia - Episode 2
programme.desc: Since the onset of the COVID19 pandemic the number of mental health calls received by Queensland ambulance has increased. All part of a day's work for professionals who go into each shift not knowing what lies ahead.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent - Episode 7
programme.desc: We are your passport to the world. Our stories, told through the ABC's network of foreign correspondents, will take you to incredible places where you'll meet the people and see the forces shaping our world.

programme.title: Planet America - Episode 11
programme.desc: Trump's presidency steamrolls into its second year and a deeply divided America celebrates its 250th birthday. US voters will go to the polls for the midterm elections - will Republicans hold on to their majority in Congress?

programme.title: Media Watch - Episode 10
programme.desc: Australia's leading forum for media analysis and comment. Host Linton Besser, a four-time Walkley award-winning investigative reporter and former foreign correspondent, brings you a fearless critique of the week's journalism.

programme.title: National Press Club Address - Dr Danielle McMullen, President of AMA
programme.desc: Dr Danielle McMullen, President of AMA, addresses the National Press Club on the topic "Underpinning Australia's healthcare system: strengthening the base, not the facade".

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien - Episode 76
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: A Bite To Eat With Alice - Kylie Kwong
programme.desc: Legend of the Aussie food scene Kylie Kwong joins Alice with a hokkien noodle recipe to die for and Alice makes her guest an almond cake for dessert.

programme.title: The Pacific - Episode 5
programme.desc: The Pacific region is rich with culture, people and stories. Johnson Raela and Alice Lolohea bring you the stories that matter to the Pacific and the most up-to-date information, from journalists with deep regional expertise.

programme.title: AFL Premiership Season - Round 6 - Carlton v Collingwood
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: Knight and Day
programme.desc: When a fugitive couple's glamorous and sometimes deadly adventure erupts into a maze of double-crosses, close escapes, false identities, and head-spinning romantic snafus, they come to realize that all they can count on is each other.

programme.title: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: Jas's peaceful countryside getaway with her sister Laura is shattered when a group of drifters attacks them. After Laura is brutally killed, Jas discovers her lifeless body at their rented cabin. Consumed by grief and fury, she vows to hunt down the gang and take vengeance on her sister's murderer.

programme.title: The Getaway
programme.desc: Three KOLs set out to live‑stream their trip to a remote island, but are deceived by a mysterious old woman who traps them there, intent on finding brides for her disabled grandsons. As they are captured, they must race against time to escape.

programme.title: The Ice Cream Truck
programme.desc: Mary moves back to her suburban hometown as her husband is relocated there for work. While waiting for her husband in their new house, Mary becomes the target of an evil slasher that stalks the suburbs in an ice-cream truck. She soon learns that the suburbs are not what they seem...

programme.title: Paper Man
programme.desc: As the police investigate a gang murder case, another mysterious paper man murder happens, and the suspects get killed one by one. Continuing to track the clues of the case, the police finally unveil a hidden secret and tragedy over two generations.

programme.title: Green Wood Robbery
programme.desc: Set in the early years of the Republic of China, the wealthy Kang family is brutally murdered, and their young daughter —the sole witness— mysteriously disappears. For decades, the haunting of the Kang house on Green Wood Lane lingers. As the truth behind the tragedy unfolds, motives of revenge and death intertwine in this chilling mystery.

programme.title: Apartment 212
programme.desc: Jennifer moves into a new apartment after leaving her abusive husband. As she starts life anew, something keeps biting her when she sleeps, leading her to be sleep deprived, paranoid and paralyzed with fear of the unseen.

programme.title: She is in Danger
programme.desc: After a fight with her boyfriend, Xue leaves home to stay in a remote B&B accommodation, together with a roommate Yi. One night, Xue accidentally discovers that Yi and another friend have killed Yi's ex-boyfriend, and is locked up by the duo so as to cover up the murder. Xue's buddy, Wen, comes seeking for her - can Xue and Wen escape from danger?

programme.title: Zombie Island
programme.desc: Jeff, a big fan of zombies, goes to a deserted and mysterious island with his friends hoping to seek out exciting adventures. What started as an adventure turns out to be a horrifying journey as they get trapped on the island and are attacked by the zombies! Their lives are in danger when they fail to fight back, and the game has only just begun!

programme.title: Paper Man

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: A horrific quadruple homicide goes unsolved for over a decade. While one investigation goes cold, another heats up as the search holds the key to unravelling the secrets of a serial killer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When teens Llianna Adank and Eric Goldstrand are found shot to death at an Oregon park in 1977, every parent's nightmare comes true.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6)
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. An accused shoplifter launches an expletive-filled freak-out during his virtual bond hearing; a defendant gets tased after trying to escape; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6)
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A melee erupts as the gallery exits a murder trial hearing; a woman wanted on drug charges gets caught lying to the judge; and more.

programme.title: After the First 48 (S15)
programme.desc: A man shoots four people in broad daylight, leaving Tulsa detectives, attorneys, and everyone impacted struggling to explain his mental state.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: After a 69-year-old woman is found dead in her bathtub, a suspect leads Tulsa detectives on a high-speed chase that ends tragically.

programme.title: After the First 48 (S16)
programme.desc: In Atlanta, when a young father is gunned down, a rookie homicide detective draws from her own experience losing a family member to murder to track down his killers.

programme.title: After the First 48 (S15)
programme.desc: A woman in a volatile relationship is found dead in her car. Detectives suspect her boyfriend, but, at trial, he takes the stand to brazenly claim she was actually the victim of a drug deal gone bad.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: When Jack and Lil are grounded by Will and Min, who are then grounded by Halmoni, the family team up to escape their punishment. // Canyon Valley hosts a festival and Jack's excited to enter, until the pressure to deliver a masterpiece gets to him.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Billy arrives, hopeful that his new sidekick Steve can join the T-Force. Phoebe and Max consider it, but soon discover that his superpower is making marshmallows. After they reject Steve's bid to join the team, he turns evil and vows revenge.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: When Ray hears that Piper is going to Junior Anger Management to work on her anger issues, he makes a wager with Henry that he can make her lose her temper before the night ends.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly’s old friend Missy moves back to Seattle, Sam believes Missy is trying to replace her as Carly’s best friend.

programme.title: Victorious
programme.desc: Tori suggests Robbie capture videos of students' everyday lives to increase his blog traffic, but when the camera is turned on Tori, she asks him to stop. Only Robbie doesn't and Tori realizes she's created a monster.

programme.title: That Girl Lay Lay
programme.desc: Lay Lay's avatar creator visits Sadie with some changes to the app settings, turning Lay Lay's personality negative, while Sadie tries to restore her best friend's positivity and convince the techie not to shut down the app completely.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Lincoln finds an old pirate's flag at Camp Mastodon, he accidentally raises a zombified Captain Kit! // At Camp Mastodon, Leni clashes with another camp counselors, River, while taking their campers on an excursion in the woods.

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob builds a pool in his backyard and Squidward tries to resist taking a dip. // Mr. Krabs must reckon with the Goobfather after he adds "Patty Whips" to the menu at the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick hires other Patricks to entertain at parties. // Pat-Thos shares a Hamdonian tale of love and pork products.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs gets trapped in Bikini Bottom’s brand-new bank, and it’s up to SpongeBob & Patrick to save him. // After failing again to steal the Krabby Patty formula, Plankton gets a pet to cheer himself up.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lori takes a waitressing job at Dad's restaurant, but it turns out that serving is harder than she anticipated.

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: For her try-out for the Varsity Mime Team, Luan must be silent for an entire day.

programme.title: That Girl Lay Lay
programme.desc: Lay Lay's avatar creator visits Sadie with some changes to the app settings, turning Lay Lay's personality negative, while Sadie tries to restore her best friend's positivity and convince the techie not to shut down the app completely.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Mrs. Wong visits Secret Shores, and threatens to reveal the Thundermans' superhero identities to the town. But Max and Phoebe's plan to have Dr. Colosso keep her quiet backfires in ways they could not have imagined.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Captain Man reveals a "Crimefighters Only" room in the Man Cave. Jealous, Charlotte, Jasper and Schwoz make a cooler room to show them up. As the gang fights over who gets the better room, things get blown out of proportion.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: When the gang befriends Bigfoot in the woods, Kid Danger and Captain Man try to help get rid of a pesky hunter that's been trying to capture him.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: After Volt and ShoutOut are kidnapped by Cyborg Rick Twitler, Henry Hart returns from Dystopia in an attempt to save his friends and stop the anti-internet cyborg for good.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly needs to intervene when Spencer becomes addicted to playing a video game. Sam tricks Freddie into believing that he’s being plagued by bad luck when he refuses to forward a 'chain email'.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: A 'Messing With Lewbert' sketch goes horribly awry, injuring Carly’s obnoxious doorman. The gang nurses him back to health until Freddie’s mother steps in and takes over. When a romance starts to blossom they have to stop it.

programme.title: Victorious
programme.desc: Tori struggles to find the perfect birthday gift for Trina, then decides to write her sister a song as a present. An ungrateful Trina turns the song into cash by selling it, enraging Tori.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: British con artists Gwen and Ruby return and, while pretending to be friendly, drive a wedge between Sam and Cat. When Sam and Cat catch on to this, they turn the tables on Gwen and Ruby.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Raph's brothers just don't get him. He NEEDS to fight! He's good at it too, according to his new trainer Spuds. But even though they don't see eye to eye, the Turtles must work together to stop a rampaging Bebop and Rocksteady from wrecking the city!

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: All of Raph's dreams have come true as he fights Rocksteady, Bebop, and Mondo Gecko in the underground Mutant Battle Arena. But he doesn't realize he's walked right into a trap set by Kitsune and her street gang, the Purple Dragons!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Bubble Bass finds himself stranded with Patrick in a mysterious swamp, looking for a lost action figure. // SpongeBob learns a new magic trick, but he can't find anyone to watch it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton creates a clone of himself and Mr. Krabs, but neither restaurant is safe from the newcomer. // Squidward gleefully switches jobs with a bus driver for an easy ride... until SpongeBob and Patrick climb aboard.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Sharing isn't easy for the twins and after a particularly heated argument they decide split the treehouse in half. // In order to win a local gardening competition, Best attempts to grow a plant, and Bester decides to be a plant.

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Bester's new pet comes between her and her brother. There's nothing to it, Best must splat the cockroach! // Best and Bester go on an epic quest for a talking whale to prove they answered a board game question correctly.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: The Stars watch a series of haunted video tapes.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick presents a show about food after missing out on a hearty breakfast. // Patrick and SpongeBob experience the wonders of the workforce.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krab into a jailhouse after Plankton breaks the law, but crime only pays for so long. // SpongeBob and Patrick turn the pineapple into a mobile home to take Squidward on the road trip he deserves.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob erects a community bulletin board in the Krusty Krab, but anonymous reviews posted on it lead to trouble.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Chloe must attend summer school, and Max is assigned to be her teacher. While they will be busy all summer, Phoebe decides to go solo on missions. She meets a new superhero named Captain Perfect, and discovers they make a good crime-fighting team.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: It's Parents' Night at SW.A.G. and Ray must get Danger Force to take a picture with their parents in the school or be shut down. But things get complicated when Chapa hires Jake Hart to be her fake dad.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Captain Man is being a baby about having a baby. Labor pains leave him helpless so Kid Danger and Piper step up to take on a couple of slick grease thieves.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Dad struggles to run Lynn's Table when his brother Lance opens up a gym above the restaurant. // Privy to all the gossip at school, Lola is recruited to write her own gossip column in the school newspaper.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad meet an impressive family they worry their kids aren't doing enough to ensure successful futures. // Tired of Lynn's poor sportsmanship during board games, the siblings decide to team up to take her down.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Zach and Rusty fake an alien landing that sends the whole town on a hunt for little green men.

programme.desc: Plankton joins the League of E.V.I.L. // SpongeBob and Patrick take Squidward on a plane to a tropical resort.

programme.desc: Lincoln wishes he had ten brothers instead of ten sisters, and Lisa gives him a glimpse into that reality. // Lola wants to be a part of the siblings' secrets club, but they won't let her in because she's a 'tattle tale'.

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House
